query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_guides,
  SUM(CASE WHEN latitude IS NOT NULL AND longitude IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_coordinates,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bestTimeToVisit IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_best_time,
  SUM(CASE WHEN currency IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_currency,
  SUM(CASE WHEN language IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_language,
  SUM(CASE WHEN overview IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_overview,
  SUM(CASE WHEN topThingsToDo IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as guides_with_activities
FROM island_guides
